10	/-!
11	# Higher direct images along open immersions of affine opens
12	
13	This file establishes `lem:open_immersion_pushforward_comp`:
14	
15	1. `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_acyclic`: for an open immersion `j : U ↪ X` of an
16	   affine open `U` into a separated scheme `X`, the higher direct images `R^q j_* H` vanish
17	   for `q ≥ 1` and any quasi-coherent `O_U`-module `H`.
18	
19	2. `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_comp` (pinned declaration): consequently, for any
20	   morphism `f : X ⟶ S` and quasi-coherent `H` on `U`, there is a canonical isomorphism
21	   `R^k f_*(j_* H) ≅ R^k (f ∘ j)_* H`.
22	
23	Blueprint: `lem:open_immersion_pushforward_comp`.
24	Source: Stacks Project, Cohomology of Schemes, `lemma-relative-affine-vanishing`.
25	-/
26	
27	universe u
28	
29	open CategoryTheory Limits
30	
31	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — reflecting `IsZero` through a faithful functor -/
32	
33	namespace CategoryTheory.Functor
34	
35	/-- **A faithful functor that preserves zero morphisms reflects the zero object.**
36	If `F` is faithful and preserves zero morphisms and `F.obj X` is a zero object, then `X`
37	is a zero object. (Three-line proof off `IsZero.iff_id_eq_zero` + `Functor.map_injective`.)
38	
39	Project-local Mathlib supplement (category theory).  A copy of the same lemma in
40	`CechAugmentedResolution.lean`; reproduced here because that sibling file is not in this
41	file's import chain. -/
42	lemma isZero_of_faithful_preservesZeroMorphisms
43	    {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] [Limits.HasZeroMorphisms C] [Limits.HasZeroMorphisms D]
44	    (F : C ⥤ D) [F.PreservesZeroMorphisms] [F.Faithful] {Y : C}
45	    (h : Limits.IsZero (F.obj Y)) : Limits.IsZero Y := by
46	  rw [Limits.IsZero.iff_id_eq_zero] at h ⊢
47	  apply F.map_injective
48	  rw [F.map_id, F.map_zero]
49	  exact h
50	
51	end CategoryTheory.Functor
52	
53	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — sheafification of a sectionwise-locally-zero presheaf -/
54	
55	namespace CategoryTheory.GrothendieckTopology
56	
57	open Opposite in
58	/-- **The sheafification of a presheaf whose sections are locally zero vanishes.**
59	If for every object `U` and every section `s : Q(U)` there is a covering sieve `S ∈ J U`
60	on which `s` restricts to `0`, then the sheafification of `Q` is a zero object.
61	
62	This is the *sectionwise* (local-injectivity) strengthening of
63	`isZero_presheafToSheaf_of_locally_isZero`: that lemma requires the *objectwise* vanishing
64	`Q.obj (op V) = 0` for every member `V` of a single covering sieve, which forces the
65	vanishing to hold on a downward-closed family.  Here only the restricted *section* need
66	vanish, so the witnessing sieve can be generated by a cofinal *basis* of "good" opens
67	(e.g. the affine opens, where the section group vanishes) even though the basis itself is
68	not downward closed.  The local injectivity of `0 : Q ⟶ Z` (`Z` the constant zero
69	presheaf) is read off from the hypothesis applied to `x - y`; local surjectivity is free.
70	Project-local Mathlib supplement (site theory). -/
71	lemma isZero_presheafToSheaf_of_sections_locally_zero {C : Type*} [Category C]
72	    (J : GrothendieckTopology C) [HasSheafify J AddCommGrpCat.{u}]
73	    [J.WEqualsLocallyBijective AddCommGrpCat.{u}]
74	    {Q : Cᵒᵖ ⥤ AddCommGrpCat.{u}}
75	    (h : ∀ (U : C) (s : ToType (Q.obj (op U))), ∃ S : Sieve U, S ∈ J U ∧
76	      ∀ ⦃V : C⦄ ⦃g : V ⟶ U⦄, S.arrows g → (ConcreteCategory.hom (Q.map g.op)) s = 0) :
77	    IsZero ((presheafToSheaf J AddCommGrpCat.{u}).obj Q) := by
78	  let Z : Cᵒᵖ ⥤ AddCommGrpCat.{u} := (Functor.const Cᵒᵖ).obj (AddCommGrpCat.of PUnit)
79	  have hZobj : ∀ x : Cᵒᵖ, IsZero (Z.obj x) := by
80	    intro x
81	    change IsZero (AddCommGrpCat.of PUnit)
82	    exact AddCommGrpCat.isZero_of_subsingleton _
83	  have hZ : IsZero Z := (Functor.isZero_iff Z).mpr hZobj
84	  haveI hli : Presheaf.IsLocallyInjective J (0 : Q ⟶ Z) := by
85	    refine ⟨?_⟩
86	    intro X x y _
87	    obtain ⟨S, hS, hSzero⟩ := h X.unop (x - y)
88	    apply J.superset_covering _ hS
89	    intro V g hg
90	    change (ConcreteCategory.hom (Q.map g.op)) x = (ConcreteCategory.hom (Q.map g.op)) y
91	    have h0 : (ConcreteCategory.hom (Q.map g.op)) (x - y) = 0 := hSzero hg
92	    rw [map_sub] at h0
93	    exact sub_eq_zero.mp h0
94	  haveI hls : Presheaf.IsLocallySurjective J (0 : Q ⟶ Z) := by
95	    refine ⟨?_⟩
96	    intro U s
97	    refine J.superset_covering (fun V g _ => ?_) (J.top_mem U)
98	    refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
99	    haveI : Subsingleton (Z.obj (op V)) := AddCommGrpCat.subsingleton_of_isZero (hZobj (op V))
100	    exact Subsingleton.elim _ _
101	  exact isZero_presheafToSheaf_obj_of_isLocallyBijective J (0 : Q ⟶ Z) hZ
102	
103	end CategoryTheory.GrothendieckTopology

105	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
106	
107	open Scheme.Modules Opposite
108	
109	-- Re-activate the (file-local) `HasExt` instance from `AbsoluteCohomology.lean` so that the
110	-- `Ext`-based transport below resolves it without the slow `HasSmallLocalizedHom` search.
111	attribute [local instance] hasExtModules
112	
113	variable {U X S : Scheme.{u}}
114	
115	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — corepresentability of the sections functor
116	
117	The sections functor `Γ(V, -)` on `X.Modules` is corepresented by the Form-B object
118	`jShriekOU V`.  Consequently its right derived functors agree, degreewise, with those of the
119	Hom-functor `Hom(jShriekOU V, -)` — the homological half of the identification
120	`Rᵠ Γ(V, -) ≅ Ext^q(jShriekOU V, -)` (the deep "Bridge (1)/(2)" connecting the higher-direct-image
121	presheaf homology to absolute cohomology). -/
122	
123	/-- **Naturality of `jShriekOU_homEquiv` in the coefficient sheaf** (reproduced here; the version
124	in `AbsoluteCohomology.lean` is `private`). Composing a map `jShriekOU V ⟶ F₁` with `g : F₁ ⟶ F₂`
125	corresponds, under corepresentability, to applying `g` on sections over `V`. -/
126	private lemma jShriekOU_homEquiv_nat (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
127	    {F₁ F₂ : X.Modules} (h : jShriekOU V ⟶ F₁) (g : F₁ ⟶ F₂) :
128	    jShriekOU_homEquiv V F₂ (h ≫ g)
129	      = (ConcreteCategory.hom (((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X).map g).app (op V)))
130	          (jShriekOU_homEquiv V F₁ h) := by
131	  have hs : sheafificationHomAddEquiv V F₂ (h ≫ g)
132	        = sheafificationHomAddEquiv V F₁ h ≫ (Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X).map g :=
133	      (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
134	        (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).homEquiv_naturality_right h g
135	  change freeYonedaHomEquiv V _ (sheafificationHomAddEquiv V F₂ (h ≫ g)) = _
136	  rw [hs, freeYonedaHomEquiv_apply, PresheafOfModules.comp_app, ModuleCat.comp_apply]
137	  rfl
138	
139	/-- `Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X` is additive (it is the additive composite
140	`forget ⋙ restrictScalars (𝟙)`). Project-local instance so `sectionsFunctor` is additive. -/
141	noncomputable instance toPresheafOfModules_additive :
142	    (Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X).Additive :=
143	  inferInstanceAs (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
144	    PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).Additive
145	
146	/-- The sections functor `Γ(V,-) : X.Modules ⥤ Ab` is additive. Project-local instance (the flat
147	triple composite does not infer additivity automatically). -/
148	noncomputable instance sectionsFunctor_additive (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) :
149	    (AlgebraicGeometry.sectionsFunctor V).Additive := by
150	  unfold AlgebraicGeometry.sectionsFunctor
151	  haveI i2 : (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
152	      (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (op V)).Additive :=
153	    Functor.instAdditiveComp _ _
154	  exact Functor.instAdditiveComp _ _
155	
156	/-- **The sections functor `Γ(V,-)` is corepresented by `jShriekOU V`.** A natural isomorphism
157	`sectionsFunctor V ≅ preadditiveCoyoneda.obj (op (jShriekOU V))`, assembled from the additive
158	corepresentability bijection `jShriekOU_homEquiv` and its naturality. Project-local: the functorial
159	upgrade of `jShriekOU_homEquiv`, the geometric input to the absolute-cohomology bridge. -/
160	noncomputable def sectionsFunctorCorepIso (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) :
161	    AlgebraicGeometry.sectionsFunctor V ≅ preadditiveCoyoneda.obj (op (jShriekOU V)) :=
162	  NatIso.ofComponents
163	    (fun F => (AddEquiv.toAddCommGrpIso (jShriekOU_homEquiv V F)).symm)
164	    (by
165	      intro F₁ F₂ g
166	      ext s
167	      simp only [AddEquiv.toAddCommGrpIso, comp_apply, Iso.symm_hom, AddCommGrpCat.hom_ofHom,
168	        AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom]
169	      rw [AddEquiv.symm_apply_eq]
170	      change (ConcreteCategory.hom ((AlgebraicGeometry.sectionsFunctor V).map g)) s
171	        = jShriekOU_homEquiv V F₂ ((jShriekOU_homEquiv V F₁).symm s ≫ g)
172	      rw [jShriekOU_homEquiv_nat V ((jShriekOU_homEquiv V F₁).symm s) g, AddEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
173	      rfl)
174	
175	/-- **Right derived functors transport along a natural isomorphism of additive functors.**
176	Project-local: assembled from `NatTrans.rightDerived` of `τ.hom`/`τ.inv` and functoriality
177	(`NatTrans.rightDerived_comp`, `NatTrans.rightDerived_id`). -/
178	noncomputable def rightDerivedNatIso {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] [Abelian C]
179	    [HasInjectiveResolutions C] [Abelian D] {F G : C ⥤ D} [F.Additive] [G.Additive]
180	    (τ : F ≅ G) (n : ℕ) : F.rightDerived n ≅ G.rightDerived n where
181	  hom := NatTrans.rightDerived τ.hom n
182	  inv := NatTrans.rightDerived τ.inv n
183	  hom_inv_id := by rw [← NatTrans.rightDerived_comp, τ.hom_inv_id, NatTrans.rightDerived_id]
184	  inv_hom_id := by rw [← NatTrans.rightDerived_comp, τ.inv_hom_id, NatTrans.rightDerived_id]
185	
186	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — `Ext` transport along the spectrum equivalence (Need #1)
187	
188	The whole-scheme spectrum isomorphism `U ≅ Spec Γ(U,𝒪)` (`Scheme.isoSpec`, a genuine iso because
189	`U` is affine) induces an *equivalence* of module categories `U.Modules ≌ (Spec Γ U).Modules`,

915	    dsimp only at hu hv
916	    have hay : (a ^ k : R) • y = gN mf := by
917	      rw [smulN, map_pow, hk]; exact hu
918	    have hfm : (f ^ l : R) • mf = mkf m0 := by rw [hl]; exact hv
919	    refine ⟨⟨h ^ l • m0, ⟨a ^ (j * l + k), j * l + k, rfl⟩⟩, ?_⟩
920	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def]
921	    change (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • y = gN (mkf (h ^ l • m0))
922	    have lhs : (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • y = (f ^ l * h ^ l) • gN mf := by
923	      rw [pow_add, hfa' l, mul_smul, hay]
924	    have rhs : gN (mkf (h ^ l • m0)) = (h ^ l * f ^ l) • gN mf := by
925	      rw [_root_.map_smul, ← hfm, LinearMap.map_smul_of_tower,
926	        LinearMap.map_smul_of_tower, ← mul_smul]
927	    rw [lhs, rhs, mul_comm (f ^ l) (h ^ l)]
928	  · -- exists_of_eq
929	    intro x1 x2 hx
930	    simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars, Function.comp_apply] at hx
931	    obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.exists_of_eq
932	      (S := Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf a)) (f := gN) hx
933	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := u.2
934	    simp only [] at hk
935	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def] at hu
936	    have h1 : mkf ((a ^ k : R) • x1) = mkf ((a ^ k : R) • x2) := by
937	      rw [_root_.map_smul, _root_.map_smul]
938	      simp only [smulMf, map_pow, hk]
939	      exact hu
940	    obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.exists_of_eq (S := Submonoid.powers f) (f := mkf) h1
941	    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := w.2
942	    simp only [] at hl
943	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def] at hw
944	    have h2 : (f ^ l : R) • (a ^ k : R) • x1 = (f ^ l : R) • (a ^ k : R) • x2 := by
945	      rw [hl]; exact hw
946	    refine ⟨⟨a ^ (j * l + k), j * l + k, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
947	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def]
948	    change (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • x1 = (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • x2
949	    have hexp : a ^ (j * l + k) = h ^ l * (f ^ l * a ^ k) := by
950	      rw [pow_add, hfa' l]; ring
951	    simp only [hexp, mul_smul]
952	    rw [h2]
953	
954	end AwayComparison
955	
956	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — base-change composite localisation (route B1, change-of-ring)
957	
958	The general-affine-open seed (Stacks 02KG over an arbitrary affine `V = ⨆ᵢ D(gᵢ)`, NOT a single
959	`D(f)`) is proved by change of base to `S = Γ(V)`, where the cover family `ḡᵢ = algebraMap R S gᵢ`
960	DOES span the unit ideal.  The transport back to `R` needs, per Čech multi-index `σ`, the fact that
961	the composite `M → M ⊗_R S → (M ⊗_R S)_{ḡσ}` (base change to `S`, then localise at `ḡσ`) presents the
962	localised tensor as the localisation `M_{gσ}` of `M` at `powers gσ` over `R`.  This is the algebraic
963	analogue of `AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away`, but with the FIRST leg a base change
964	(`IsBaseChange S`) rather than a localisation: `M → M_S` is not a localisation of `M` (S is not a
965	localisation of `R`).  The single geometric input — that the localised ring is simultaneously an
966	`R`-localisation at `powers gσ` — is supplied as the instance `[IsLocalization (powers a) Aloc]`. -/
967	
968	/-- **Base-change composite is a localisation.**  Let `bc : M →ₗ[R] MS` exhibit `MS` as the base
969	change of `M` to an `R`-algebra `S` (`IsBaseChange S bc`), and let `gN : MS →ₗ[S] N` localise `MS`
970	at `powers (algebraMap R S a)` over `S`, with localised ring `Aloc`.  If `Aloc` is moreover an
971	`R`-localisation at `powers a` (the geometric input, encoding `D(a) ⊆ Spec S` when `S = Γ(V)`), then
972	the `R`-linear composite `gN ∘ bc : M →ₗ[R] N` exhibits `N` as the localisation of `M` at `powers a`.
973	
974	Pure base-change algebra: `IsBaseChange` is transitive (`IsBaseChange.comp`), and
975	`isLocalizedModule_iff_isBaseChange` converts both directions.  This is the route-B1 replacement for
976	`AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` in the general-affine `dDiff_exact_of_affineCover`. -/
977	theorem isLocalizedModule_baseChange_away
978	    {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u} [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
979	    {S : Type u} [CommRing S] [Algebra R S]
980	    {MS : Type u} [AddCommGroup MS] [Module R MS] [Module S MS] [IsScalarTower R S MS]
981	    (bc : M →ₗ[R] MS) (hbc : IsBaseChange S bc)
982	    {a : R}
983	    {N : Type u} [AddCommGroup N] [Module R N] [Module S N] [IsScalarTower R S N]
984	    (gN : MS →ₗ[S] N)
985	    (Aloc : Type u) [CommRing Aloc] [Algebra S Aloc]
986	    [IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S a)) Aloc]
987	    [Module Aloc N] [IsScalarTower S Aloc N]
988	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S a)) gN]
989	    [Algebra R Aloc] [IsScalarTower R S Aloc] [IsScalarTower R Aloc N]
990	    [IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers a) Aloc] :
991	    IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) ((gN.restrictScalars R) ∘ₗ bc) := by
992	  have hg : IsBaseChange Aloc gN :=
993	    (isLocalizedModule_iff_isBaseChange (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S a)) Aloc gN).mp
994	      inferInstance
995	  exact (isLocalizedModule_iff_isBaseChange (Submonoid.powers a) Aloc _).mpr (hbc.comp hg)
996	
997	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — the un-localised section Čech module complex `D•`
998	
999	`D^m` is the product `∏_{σ : Fin m → ι} M_{s_σ}` of away-localisations of
1000	`M = Γ(Spec R, F)` at the multi-index products `s_σ = ∏ₖ s_{σ k}`; its differential
1001	is the alternating sum of the canonical localisation comparison maps (index deletion
1002	drops a factor, so `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`).  This is the concrete `R`-module complex `D•`
1003	of `lem:section_cech_homology_exact` that the section Čech complex is identified
1004	with.  Positive-degree exactness is reduced — via `exact_of_isLocalized_span` — to
1005	the localised complexes already shown exact in `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`;
1006	the bridge is the localisation-transitivity lemma
1007	`AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule` (applied here as
1008	`dToCech_isLocalizedModule`). -/
1009	
1010	namespace SectionCechModule
1011	
1012	open CechLocalized AwayComparison
1013	
1014	variable {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {ι : Type*} (s : ι → R)
1015	variable (M : Type u) [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
1016	
1017	/-- The un-localised section Čech coefficient `D_σ = M_{s_σ}`. -/
1018	abbrev dCoeff {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) : Type u :=
1019	  LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M
1020	
1021	/-- The un-localised coface comparison `δ : M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}} → M_{s_σ}` (R-linear), the
1022	canonical localisation map for the divisibility `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`. -/
1023	noncomputable def dCoface (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
1024	    dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
1025	  comparison
1026	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
1027	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
1028	    (Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
1029	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M))
1030	
1031	/-- The un-localised differential `d : D^m → D^{m+1}` as an `R`-linear map: the
1032	alternating sum of cofaces, assembled with `LinearMap.pi` over the output tuple. -/
1033	noncomputable def dDiff (m : ℕ) :
1034	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :=
1035	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1036	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (dCoface s M m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
1037	
1038	/-- Apply form of `dDiff`: the alternating sum of cofaces of the deleted faces. -/
1039	lemma dDiff_apply (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
1040	    dDiff s M m t σ
1041	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • dCoface s M m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
1042	  rw [dDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
1043	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
1044	
1045	variable (r : ι)
1046	
1047	/-- The per-index localisation comparison `M_{s_σ} → M_{s_r · s_σ}` carrying the
1048	un-localised coefficient to the `cechCoeff` coefficient localised at `s_r`. -/
1049	noncomputable def dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1050	    dCoeff s M σ →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
1051	  comparison
1052	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
1053	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
1054	    (Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r))
1055	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
1056	
1057	/-- **Transitivity payoff**: `dToCech` exhibits the localised coefficient
1058	`cechCoeff = M_{s_r · s_σ}` as the localisation of the un-localised coefficient
1059	`M_{s_σ}` away from the spanning element `s_r`.  Direct from
1060	`AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule`; this is the per-coefficient input the
1061	`exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction of the section Čech complex consumes. -/
1062	lemma dToCech_isLocalizedModule {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1063	    IsLocalizedModule.Away (s r) (dToCech s M r σ) := by
1064	  haveI inst : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ * s r))
1065	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M) := by
1066	    rw [mul_comm]; infer_instance
1067	  unfold dToCech
1068	  exact comparison_isLocalizedModule (a := sprod s σ) (b := s r) _ _ _
1069	
1070	/-- **Per-coface localisation naturality**: the localised coface `cechCoface`
1071	intertwines the per-index comparison `dToCech` with the un-localised coface
1072	`dCoface`.  Both composites are away-comparison maps from `M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}}` to
1073	`M_{s_r · s_σ}`, hence equal by `comparison_comp`.  This is the square that, summed
1074	over the alternating signs, identifies the localised differential
1075	`IsLocalizedModule.map (dDiff)` with `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` —
1076	the final brick of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction. -/
1077	lemma cechCoface_dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
1078	    (x : dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
1079	    cechCoface s M r m σ j (dToCech s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) x)
1080	      = dToCech s M r σ (dCoface s M m σ j x) := by
1081	  simp only [cechCoface, dToCech, dCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
1082	  rw [comparison_comp_apply, comparison_comp_apply]
1083	  exact Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_trans (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j) (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r)))
1084	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
1085	
1086	/-- **Differential-naturality square** (the heart of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span`
1087	reduction): localising the un-localised differential `dDiff` at a spanning element
1088	`s_r` — via the per-index comparisons `dToCech` — yields the localised differential
1089	`CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)`.  Summing the per-coface squares
1090	`cechCoface_dToCech` over the alternating signs.  Combined with
1091	`dToCech_isLocalizedModule`, `IsLocalizedModule.pi`, and the uniqueness of
1092	`IsLocalizedModule.map`, this identifies the localised `dDiff` with the
1093	exact complex `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
1094	lemma dToCech_comm (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :
1095	    CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r) (m := m)
1096	        (fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (t σ))
1097	      = fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (dDiff s M m t σ) := by
1098	  funext σ
1099	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
1100	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => ?_
1101	  rw [map_zsmul, cechCoface_dToCech]
1102	
1103	/-! ### Assembly of step (a): positive-degree exactness of `D•`
1104	
1105	The localised differential at a fixed index `r`, bundled as an `R`-linear map
1106	(`locDiff`), so that `IsLocalizedModule.map` uniqueness identifies it with the
1107	localisation of `dDiff`.  Everything here is at a *fixed* index `r : ι` (no
1108	`Classical.choose`), hence friction-free; the spanning-element bookkeeping is
1109	confined to the final `dDiff_exact`. -/
1110	
1111	/-- R-linear underlying map of the localised coface `cechCoface` (the `comparison`
1112	before `.toAddMonoidHom`). -/
1113	noncomputable def cechCofaceLin (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
1114	    cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
1115	  comparison
1116	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
1117	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
1118	    (Inverts.of_dvd (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j))
1119	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
1120	
1121	lemma cechCoface_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
1122	    (x : cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
1123	    cechCoface s M r m σ j x = cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j x := rfl
1124	
1125	/-- The localised section Čech differential at index `r`, as a bundled `R`-linear
1126	map (mirrors `dDiff` with the localised cofaces). -/
1127	noncomputable def locDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1128	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
1129	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1130	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
1131	
1132	lemma locDiff_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ)
1133	    (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
1134	    locDiff s M r m t σ
1135	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1136	          (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
1137	  rw [locDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
1138	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
1139	
1140	/-- `locDiff` agrees, as a raw function, with the localised combinatorial
1141	differential `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` already shown exact. -/
1142	lemma locDiff_eq_depDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1143	    ⇑(locDiff s M r m)
1144	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ)
1145	          (cechCoface s M r) (m := m) := by
1146	  funext t σ
1147	  rw [locDiff_apply]
1148	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff]
1149	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => by rw [cechCoface_apply]
1150	
1151	/-- Positive-degree exactness of the bundled localised differential, transported
1152	from `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
1153	lemma locDiff_exact (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1154	    Function.Exact (locDiff s M r (m + 1)) (locDiff s M r (m + 2)) := by
1155	  rw [locDiff_eq_depDiff, locDiff_eq_depDiff]
1156	  exact CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact s M r m
1157	
1158	/-- The product localisation map `D^m → ∏_σ M_{s_r·s_σ}` at index `r`. -/
1159	noncomputable def fLoc (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1160	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
1161	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => dToCech s M r σ ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj σ
1162	
1163	lemma fLoc_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1164	    fLoc s M r m t σ = dToCech s M r σ (t σ) := by
1165	  simp only [fLoc, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.proj_apply]
1166	
1167	/-- `fLoc` exhibits the product localised coefficient as the localisation of `D^m`
1168	away from `s_r` (from `IsLocalizedModule.pi` + `dToCech_isLocalizedModule`). -/
1169	instance fLoc_isLocalizedModule [Finite ι] (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1170	    IsLocalizedModule.Away (s r) (fLoc s M r m) := by
1171	  haveI : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (s r)) (dToCech s M r σ) :=
1172	    fun σ => dToCech_isLocalizedModule s M r σ
1173	  exact IsLocalizedModule.pi (Submonoid.powers (s r)) fun σ => dToCech s M r σ
1174	
1175	/-- The localised differential intertwines `fLoc` with `dDiff` (the `dToCech_comm`
1176	square, packaged through the bundled maps). -/
1177	lemma locDiff_fLoc (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :
1178	    locDiff s M r m (fLoc s M r m t) = fLoc s M r (m + 1) (dDiff s M m t) := by
1179	  have h1 : ⇑(locDiff s M r m) (fLoc s M r m t)
1180	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r) (m := m)
1181	          (fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (t σ)) := by
1182	    rw [locDiff_eq_depDiff]
1183	    exact congrArg _ (funext fun σ => fLoc_apply s M r m t σ)
1184	  rw [h1, dToCech_comm]
1185	  funext σ
1186	  exact (fLoc_apply s M r (m + 1) (dDiff s M m t) σ).symm
1187	
1188	/-- `IsLocalizedModule.map` of `dDiff` is the bundled localised differential
1189	`locDiff` — by `IsLocalizedModule.ext`, the comparison reducing to `locDiff_fLoc`.
1190	Stated for an arbitrary away element `a` (with `s r = a`) so the spanning-element
1191	bookkeeping in `dDiff_exact` needs no `↑ρ`-rewrite inside the localised map. -/
1192	lemma map_dDiff_eq_locDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) {a : R}
1193	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m)]
1194	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r (m + 1))] :
1195	    IsLocalizedModule.map (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m) (fLoc s M r (m + 1))
1196	        (dDiff s M m) = locDiff s M r m := by
1197	  apply IsLocalizedModule.ext (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m)
1198	    (fun x => IsLocalizedModule.map_units (fLoc s M r (m + 1)) x)
1199	  apply LinearMap.ext; intro t
1200	  rw [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, IsLocalizedModule.map_apply, locDiff_fLoc]
1201	
1202	/-- A chosen `ι`-index realising a spanning-set element as `s i`, kept opaque so
1203	the spanning-element rewrite in `dDiff_exact` has a type-correct motive (the index
1204	must not syntactically contain `↑ρ`). -/
1205	private noncomputable def spanIdx (ρ : ↑(Set.range s)) : ι := ρ.2.choose
1206	
1207	omit [CommRing R] in
1208	private lemma spanIdx_spec (ρ : ↑(Set.range s)) : s (spanIdx s ρ) = ↑ρ := ρ.2.choose_spec
1209	
1210	/-- **Step (a): positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module
1211	complex `D•`** (`lem:cech_acyclic_affine`, the `R`-module core).  For a spanning
1212	family `s : ι → R` (`Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤`), the complex
1213	`∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is exact in positive degrees.  Reduced — via
1214	`exact_of_isLocalized_span` localising at each spanning element `s_r` — to the
1215	exactness `locDiff_exact` of the localised complexes (which is the dependent
1216	combinatorial core `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`), through the localised-
1217	differential identification `map_dDiff_eq_locDiff`. -/
1218	lemma dDiff_exact [Finite ι] (hs : Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤) (m : ℕ) :
1219	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1220	  classical
1221	  haveI inst1 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1222	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1)) := fun ρ => by
1223	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1224	  haveI inst2 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1225	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2)) := fun ρ => by
1226	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1227	  haveI inst3 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1228	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 3)) := fun ρ => by
1229	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1230	  refine exact_of_isLocalized_span (Set.range s) hs
1231	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1232	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1))
1233	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1234	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2))
1235	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 3) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1236	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 3))
1237	    (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) fun ρ => ?_

1239	    map_dDiff_eq_locDiff s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2)]
1240	  exact locDiff_exact s M (spanIdx s ρ) m

1242	set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
1243	-- raised: the change-of-ring ladder repeatedly synthesises `AddMonoidHomClass` over the
1244	-- `dCoeff`-abbreviated `LocalizedModule` carriers, which is instance-search heavy.
1245	set_option synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 800000 in
1246	/-- **Route-B positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module complex
1247	`D•` over a standard *sub*cover of `D(f)`** (`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`,
1248	module core).  Here `s = g` need NOT span the unit ideal of `R`; only its image `s/1`
1249	spans the unit ideal of the away ring `R_f` (`hspan`), and each `s i` lies in `√(f)`
1250	(`hmem`).  The complex `∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is then exact in positive degrees.
1251	
1252	Route B (change-of-ring): instantiate `dDiff_exact` over `R_f = Localization.Away f` with
1253	the module `M_f = LocalizedModule (powers f) M` and the spanning family `s/1`, then transport
1254	the resulting positive-degree exactness back to the `R`-side along the degreewise additive
1255	isomorphisms `M_{s_σ} ≅ (M_f)_{s_σ}` (`AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` + the
1256	universal `IsLocalizedModule.iso`), which intertwine the alternating-sum localisation
1257	differentials. -/
1258	lemma dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway [Finite ι] (f : R)
1259	    (hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k)
1260	    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤)
1261	    (m : ℕ) :
1262	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1263	  classical
1264	  set Rf := Localization.Away f with hRf
1265	  set Mf := LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers f) M with hMf
1266	  set g' : ι → Rf := fun i => algebraMap R Rf (s i) with hg'
1267	  -- `R_f`-side positive-degree exactness (the black-box reuse of `dDiff_exact`).
1268	  have Hf : Function.Exact (dDiff g' Mf (m + 1)) (dDiff g' Mf (m + 2)) :=
1269	    dDiff_exact g' Mf hspan m
1270	  -- `sprod g' σ` is the image of `sprod s σ`.
1271	  have hsprod : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin n → ι), sprod g' σ = algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ) := by
1272	    intro n σ; simp only [g', sprod, map_prod]
1273	  -- per (nonempty) `σ`: `f` divides a power of `sprod s σ`.
1274	  have hdvd : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), ∃ k, f ∣ sprod s σ ^ k := by
1275	    intro n σ
1276	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hmem (σ 0)
1277	    refine ⟨k, ?_⟩
1278	    have he : sprod s σ ^ k = s (σ 0) ^ k * (∏ x : Fin n, s (σ x.succ)) ^ k := by
1279	      rw [sprod, Fin.prod_univ_succ, mul_pow]
1280	    rw [he]; exact hk.mul_right _
1281	  -- the composite localisation structure map `M → M_f → (M_f)_{s_σ}` localises `M` at `s_σ`.
1282	  have inst_comp : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
1283	      IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1284	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1285	          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M) := by
1286	    intro n σ
1287	    obtain ⟨k, h, hh⟩ := hdvd σ
1288	    haveI : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ)))
1289	        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf) := by
1290	      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
1291	    exact AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away f (sprod s σ) h hh
1292	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)
1293	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf)
1294	  -- the per-σ `R`-linear comparison `(M_f)_{s_σ} ≅ M_{s_σ}` (Rf-side → R-side).
1295	  let eσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), dCoeff g' Mf σ ≃ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
1296	    fun {n} σ =>
1297	      haveI := inst_comp σ
1298	      (IsLocalizedModule.iso (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1299	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1300	          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)).symm
1301	  -- `eσL τ` undoes the composite structure map: it sends `compMap τ mval ↦ mk_{s_τ} mval`.
1302	  have heσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (τ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) (mval : M),
1303	      eσL τ ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf)
1304	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval))
1305	        = LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ)) M mval := by
1306	    intro n τ mval
1307	    haveI := inst_comp τ
1308	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun (IsLocalizedModule.iso_symm_comp (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ))
1309	      ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1310	        LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)) mval
1311	  -- per-coface naturality: `eσ` intertwines the two cofaces.
1312	  have nat : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 2) → ι) (j : Fin (n + 2))
1313	      (z : dCoeff g' Mf (σ ∘ j.succAbove)),
1314	      eσL σ (dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j z)
1315	        = dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) z) := by
1316	    intro n σ j z
1317	    haveI := inst_comp (σ ∘ j.succAbove)
1318	    -- reduce to elements `compMap (σ∘d) mval` by localisation extensionality
1319	    have key : (eσL σ).toLinearMap ∘ₗ (dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j).restrictScalars R
1320	        = (dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j) ∘ₗ (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove)).toLinearMap := by
1321	      apply IsLocalizedModule.ext (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove)))
1322	        (LinearMap.restrictScalars R
1323	            (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) Mf)
1324	          ∘ₗ LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)
1325	        (fun x => (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
1326	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)).isUnit_powers x)
1327	      apply LinearMap.ext; intro mval
1328	      simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars, Function.comp_apply,
1329	        LinearEquiv.coe_coe]
1330	      -- LHS
1331	      have hL : dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j
1332	            ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) Mf)
1333	              (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval))
1334	          = (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf)
1335	              (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval) := by
1336	        simp only [dCoface]
1337	        exact AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ _
1338	      rw [hL, heσL σ mval, heσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) mval]
1339	      -- RHS
1340	      simp only [dCoface]
1341	      exact (AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ mval).symm
1342	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun key z
1343	  -- bundle the per-σ comparisons into product `AddEquiv`s.
1344	  let E : (n : ℕ) → ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff g' Mf σ) ≃+
1345	      ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff s M σ) :=
1346	    fun n => AddEquiv.piCongrRight (fun σ => (eσL σ).toAddEquiv)
1347	  -- the ladder squares.
1348	  have sq : ∀ r : ℕ,
1349	      (dDiff s M (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (E r).toAddMonoidHom
1350	        = (E (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (dDiff g' Mf (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom := by
1351	    intro r
1352	    apply AddMonoidHom.ext; intro x
1353	    simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
1354	      LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
1355	    funext σ
1356	    change dDiff s M (r + 1) (fun τ => eσL τ (x τ)) σ
1357	      = eσL σ (dDiff g' Mf (r + 1) x σ)
1358	    rw [dDiff_apply, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
1359	    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun j _ => ?_)
1360	    rw [map_zsmul, nat]
1361	  exact Function.Exact.of_ladder_addEquiv_of_exact (E m) (E (m + 1)) (E (m + 2))
1362	    (sq m) (sq (m + 1)) Hf

1367	set_option synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 800000 in
1368	/-- **Route-B1 positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module complex `D•` over a
1369	cover of a *general affine open* `V = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)`** (`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_general_seed`, module
1370	core).  The cover family `s = g` need NOT span the unit ideal of `R`, and `V` need NOT be a single
1371	distinguished `D(f)`; only the images `sᵢ ↦ S = Γ(V)` span the unit ideal of `S` (`hspan`).  Then the
1372	complex `∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is exact in positive degrees.
1373	
1374	Route B1 (change of ring to `S = Γ(V)` via algebraic base change `M ⊗_R S`): instantiate `dDiff_exact`
1375	over `S` with the module `M_S = M ⊗_R S` and the spanning family `s̄ = algebraMap R S ∘ s`, then transport
1376	the resulting positive-degree exactness back to the `R`-side along the degreewise additive isomorphisms
1377	`M_{s_σ} ≅ (M_S)_{s̄_σ}` (`isLocalizedModule_baseChange_away` + the universal `IsLocalizedModule.iso`),
1378	which intertwine the alternating-sum localisation differentials.  The geometric input — that the
1379	localisation `(M_S)_{s̄_σ}`'s ring is simultaneously an `R`-localisation at `powers (s_σ)`, encoding
1380	`D(s_σ) ⊆ V` — is supplied per Čech multi-index `σ` by the `hloc` family (discharged at the wrapper
1381	from `IsAffineOpen V` via `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen`). -/
1382	lemma dDiff_exact_of_affineCover [Finite ι]
1383	    (S : Type u) [CommRing S] [Algebra R S]
1384	    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R S (s i))) = ⊤)
1385	    (hloc : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
1386	      IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1387	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (sprod s σ)))))
1388	    (m : ℕ) :
1389	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1390	  classical
1391	  set MS := TensorProduct R S M with hMS
1392	  set bc : M →ₗ[R] MS := TensorProduct.mk R S M 1 with hbc
1393	  set gS : ι → S := fun i => algebraMap R S (s i) with hgS
1394	  -- `S`-side positive-degree exactness (the black-box reuse of `dDiff_exact`).
1395	  have Hf : Function.Exact (dDiff gS MS (m + 1)) (dDiff gS MS (m + 2)) :=
1396	    dDiff_exact gS MS hspan m
1397	  -- `sprod gS σ` is the image of `sprod s σ`.
1398	  have hsprod : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin n → ι), sprod gS σ = algebraMap R S (sprod s σ) := by
1399	    intro n σ; simp only [hgS, sprod, map_prod]
1400	  -- the composite localisation structure map `M → M_S → (M_S)_{s_σ}` localises `M` at `s_σ`.
1401	  have inst_comp : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
1402	      IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1403	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ bc) := by
1404	    intro n σ
1405	    haveI hL : IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (sprod s σ)))
1406	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ))) := by
1407	      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
1408	    haveI hLM : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (sprod s σ)))
1409	        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS) := by
1410	      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
1411	    haveI hR : IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1412	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ))) := by
1413	      rw [hsprod σ]; exact hloc σ
1414	    exact isLocalizedModule_baseChange_away bc (TensorProduct.isBaseChange R M S)
1415	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS)
1416	      (Localization (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ))) (a := sprod s σ)
1417	  -- the per-σ `R`-linear comparison `(M_S)_{s_σ} ≅ M_{s_σ}` (S-side → R-side).
1418	  let eσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), dCoeff gS MS σ ≃ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
1419	    fun {n} σ =>
1420	      haveI := inst_comp σ
1421	      (IsLocalizedModule.iso (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1422	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1423	          bc)).symm
1424	  -- `eσL τ` undoes the composite structure map: it sends `compMap τ mval ↦ mk_{s_τ} mval`.

1428	    intro n τ mval
1429	    haveI := inst_comp τ
1430	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun (IsLocalizedModule.iso_symm_comp (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ))
1431	      ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS τ)) MS).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1432	        bc)) mval
1433	  -- per-coface naturality: `eσ` intertwines the two cofaces.
1434	  have nat : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 2) → ι) (j : Fin (n + 2))
1435	      (z : dCoeff gS MS (σ ∘ j.succAbove)),
1436	      eσL σ (dCoface gS MS (n + 1) σ j z)
1437	        = dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) z) := by
1438	    intro n σ j z

1440	    have key : (eσL σ).toLinearMap ∘ₗ (dCoface gS MS (n + 1) σ j).restrictScalars R

1445	          ∘ₗ bc)

1447	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)).isUnit_powers x)
1448	      apply LinearMap.ext; intro mval
1449	      simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars, Function.comp_apply,

1484	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — quasi-coherent sections as away localisations (L1, step (b))
1485	
1486	The categorical→module bridge needs the section-identification of
1487	`def:qcoh_sections_localized`: over a basic open `D(g)` the sections of a
1488	quasi-coherent sheaf are the away localisation `M_g`, and the restriction maps
1489	between basic opens are the canonical localisation comparison maps.  For the
1490	standard sheaf `tilde M` this is *verbatim* from Mathlib's `Tilde` development
1491	(`AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen` carries `IsLocalizedModule (.powers g)` and the
1492	restriction compatibility is `tilde.toOpen_res`); the only project-local content is
1493	(i) the multi-index intersection `⨅ₖ D(s_{σ k}) = D(s_σ)` identification, which lets
1494	the degree-`p` section group over the `(p+1)`-fold intersection be read as the
1495	localisation `M_{s_σ}` (this is what `lem:section_cech_homology_exact` consumes
1496	degreewise), and (ii) the identification of the abstract presheaf restriction with
1497	`AwayComparison.comparison`, the differential brick.
1498	
1499	For an *arbitrary* quasi-coherent `F` the remaining input is the affine equivalence
1500	`F ≅ tilde(ΓF)` (Stacks 01I8); see `def:qcoh_sections_localized`.  The tilde case
1501	below is the gap-free part that lands the named target. -/
1502	
1503	/-- Splitting an indexed infimum over `Fin (n+1)` into the `0`-th term and the
1504	infimum over the tail.  Lattice-combinatorial helper behind `basicOpen_sprod`. -/
1505	private lemma iInf_fin_succ {α : Type*} [CompleteLattice α] (n : ℕ) (f : Fin (n + 1) → α) :
1506	    (⨅ i, f i) = f 0 ⊓ ⨅ i : Fin n, f i.succ := by
1507	  apply le_antisymm
1508	  · exact le_inf (iInf_le _ 0) (le_iInf fun i => iInf_le _ i.succ)
1509	  · refine le_iInf fun i => ?_
1510	    refine Fin.cases inf_le_left (fun j => le_trans inf_le_right (iInf_le _ j)) i
1511	
1512	/-- **Multi-index basic-open intersection** (geometric input to step (c)): the
1513	`(p+1)`-fold intersection of the basic opens `D(s_{σ k})` of a {\v C}ech multi-index
1514	`σ : Fin n → ι` is the basic open `D(s_σ)` of the product `s_σ = ∏ₖ s_{σ k}`.  This
1515	identifies the section group `F(⨅ₖ D(s_{σ k}))` of `sectionCechCosimplicial` with the
1516	away localisation `M_{s_σ}` of `SectionCechModule.dCoeff`. -/
1517	lemma basicOpen_sprod {R : CommRingCat.{u}} {ι : Type u} (n : ℕ) (s : ι → R) (σ : Fin n → ι) :
1518	    (⨅ k, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s (σ k)) : (Spec R).Opens)
1519	      = PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (∏ k, s (σ k)) := by
1520	  induction n with
1521	  | zero =>
1522	      rw [show (∏ k, s (σ k)) = 1 from Finset.prod_of_isEmpty _]
1523	      simp only [PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen_one]
1524	      exact iInf_of_empty _
1525	  | succ m ih =>
1526	      rw [Fin.prod_univ_succ, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen_mul, ← ih (fun i => σ i.succ),
1527	        iInf_fin_succ]
1528	      rfl
1529	
1530	/-- **Quasi-coherent sections over a {\v C}ech intersection are an away localisation**
1531	(`def:qcoh_sections_localized`, tilde case — step (b) of the L1 bridge).  For the
1532	standard sheaf `tilde M` of an `R`-module `M`, the section-restriction map from `M`
1533	to the sections over the `(p+1)`-fold basic-open intersection
1534	`⨅ₖ D(s_{σ k}) = D(s_σ)` exhibits that section group as the away localisation

1536	Mathlib instance `IsLocalizedModule (.powers g) (tilde.toOpen M (D g)).hom` with the
1537	intersection identification `basicOpen_sprod`.  This is the degreewise section
1538	identification that `lem:section_cech_homology_exact` consumes; the restriction
1539	compatibility (item (5) of the blueprint definition) is `tilde.toOpen_res` together

1541	lemma qcohSectionsAwayLocalized {R : CommRingCat.{u}} {ι : Type u}

1543	    IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (∏ k, s (σ k)))
1544	      (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen M (⨅ k, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s (σ k)))).hom := by
1545	  rw [basicOpen_sprod]
1546	  infer_instance

1548	/-- **Restriction = localisation comparison** (`def:qcoh_sections_localized`, item (5);

1551	`D(b) ⊆ D(a)`) is, as an `R`-linear map, the canonical away-localisation comparison

1559	lemma qcohRestriction_eq_comparison {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat.{u} R) {a b : R}

1561	    (hb : AwayComparison.Inverts a
1562	      ((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (tilde M)).presheaf.obj
1563	        (Opposite.op (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen b)))) :
1564	    ((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (tilde M)).presheaf.map i.op).hom
1565	      = AwayComparison.comparison (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen M (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a)).hom

1567	  haveI : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a)
1568	      (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen M (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a)).hom := inferInstance
1569	  refine (AwayComparison.comparison_unique
1570	    (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen M (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a)).hom
1571	    (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen M (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen b)).hom hb _ ?_).symm
1572	  have h := AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen_res M (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a)
1573	    (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen b) i

1576	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — section {\v C}ech homology bridge (L1 steps c, d)
1577	
1578	The categorical→module bridge of `lem:section_cech_homology_exact`: the
1579	`Ab`-valued section {\v C}ech complex `sectionCechComplex` (of `PresheafCech.lean`)
1580	has its degree-`p` object a *categorical product* `∏ᶜ_σ F(⨅ₖ U (σ k))` in `Ab`, and
1581	its differential the alternating sum of the {\v C}ech coface restrictions.  These
1582	lemmas (c1)–(c3) move that abstract complex to the concrete localised-module complex
1583	`SectionCechModule.dDiff` (whose positive-degree exactness `dDiff_exact` is step (a)),
1584	and read off homology vanishing. -/

1586	section SectionCechBridge
1587	
1588	open CategoryTheory.Limits AlgebraicTopology
1589	
1590	variable {X : Scheme.{u}}
1591	
1592	/-- **(c1) Element-level product equivalence** (`lem:section_cech_product_equiv`):
1593	the underlying type of the degree-`p` object `∏ᶜ_σ F(⨅ₖ U (σ k))` of the section
1594	{\v C}ech cosimplicial object is the dependent product `∏_σ ToType (F(⨅ₖ U (σ k)))`.
1595	Supplied by `CategoryTheory.Limits.Concrete.productEquiv` (the forgetful functor of
1596	`Ab` preserves discrete products). -/
1597	noncomputable def sectionCechProductEquiv {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
1598	    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (p : ℕ) :
1599	    ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial U F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk p)) ≃
1600	      (∀ σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι, ToType (F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))) :=
1601	  Concrete.productEquiv
1602	    (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι => F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))
1603	
1604	/-- Coordinate projection of `sectionCechProductEquiv`: the `σ`-component is the
1605	underlying group map of the categorical projection `Pi.π … σ`.  A definitional
1606	restatement of `Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply`, named so that downstream proofs can
1607	`rw` it without fighting the `Concrete.productEquiv` coercion. -/
1608	lemma sectionCechProductEquiv_apply {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
1609	    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (p : ℕ)
1610	    (y : ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial U F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk p)))
1611	    (σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι) :
1612	    sectionCechProductEquiv U F p y σ
1613	      = ConcreteCategory.hom
1614	          (Pi.π (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι => F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k)))) σ) y :=
1615	  Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply _ y σ
1616	
1617	/-- **Homology-to-exactness reduction** (the `Ab`-side of `lem:section_cech_ab_exact`):
1618	the degree-`(q+1)` homology of the section {\v C}ech complex vanishes once the
1619	underlying group homomorphisms of the two consecutive coface differentials
1620	`objD q`, `objD (q+1)` form an exact sequence.  Pure homological algebra: combines
1621	`exactAt_iff_isZero_homology`, `exactAt_iff'`, and the abelian-group exactness
1622	criterion `ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff_function_exact`. -/
1623	lemma sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact {ι : Type u}
1624	    (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X) (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (q : ℕ)
1625	    (h : Function.Exact
1626	      (ConcreteCategory.hom (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q))
1627	      (ConcreteCategory.hom
1628	        (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) (q + 1)))) :
1629	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex U F).homology (q + 1)) := by
1630	  rw [← HomologicalComplex.exactAt_iff_isZero_homology,
1631	      (sectionCechComplex U F).exactAt_iff' q (q + 1) (q + 2) (by simp) (by simp),
1632	      ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff_function_exact]
1633	  have hf : (sectionCechComplex U F).d q (q + 1)
1634	      = AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q :=
1635	    CochainComplex.of_d _ _ (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.d_squared _) q
1636	  have hg : (sectionCechComplex U F).d (q + 1) (q + 2)
1637	      = AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) (q + 1) :=
1638	    CochainComplex.of_d _ _ (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.d_squared _) (q + 1)
1639	  change Function.Exact
1640	      (ConcreteCategory.hom ((sectionCechComplex U F).d q (q + 1)))
1641	      (ConcreteCategory.hom ((sectionCechComplex U F).d (q + 1) (q + 2)))
1642	  rw [hf, hg]
1643	  exact h
1644	
1645	/-- Application of a finite sum of `Ab`-morphisms distributes over the sum. -/
1646	private lemma ab_hom_finsetSum_apply {A B : Ab.{u}} {κ : Type*}
1647	    (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → (A ⟶ B)) (t : ToType A) :
1648	    ConcreteCategory.hom (∑ i ∈ s, f i) t = ∑ i ∈ s, ConcreteCategory.hom (f i) t := by
1649	  classical
1650	  induction s using Finset.induction with
1651	  | empty => simp
1652	  | insert a s ha ih =>
1653	      rw [Finset.sum_insert ha, Finset.sum_insert ha, AddCommGrpCat.hom_add_apply, ih]
1654	
1655	/-- The `i`-th section {\v C}ech face restriction at a multi-index `σ` of the
1656	cosimplicial section object: the presheaf restriction of `F` from the deleted-face
1657	intersection `⨅ₗ U (σ (δ i l))` to the full intersection `⨅ₖ U (σ k)`.  Factored as a
1658	named `def` so the cosimplicial differential (`sectionCech_objD_apply`) refers to it
1659	by name rather than re-elaborating the `homOfLE (le_iInf …)` term. -/
1660	noncomputable def sectionCechFaceRestr {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
1661	    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) {q : ℕ} (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) (i : Fin (q + 2)) :
1662	    F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ l, U ((σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom) l)))
1663	      ⟶ F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))) :=
1664	  F.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_iInf
1665	    (fun l => iInf_le _ ((SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom l)))).op
1666	
1667	/-- **(c2, abstract) Coface match**: the underlying group action of the section
1668	{\v C}ech coface differential `objD q`, read through the product equivalence, is the
1669	alternating sum of the presheaf restriction maps applied to the deleted-face
1670	coordinates — exactly the shape of `SectionCechModule.dDiff`.  This is purely about
1671	the cosimplicial structure of `sectionCechCosimplicial`; no sheaf identification yet. -/
1672	lemma sectionCech_objD_apply {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
1673	    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (q : ℕ)
1674	    (t : ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial U F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk q)))
1675	    (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) :
1676	    sectionCechProductEquiv U F (q + 1)
1677	        (ConcreteCategory.hom
1678	          (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q) t) σ
1679	      = ∑ i : Fin (q + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
1680	          ConcreteCategory.hom (sectionCechFaceRestr U F σ i)
1681	            (sectionCechProductEquiv U F q t (σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom)) := by
1682	  classical
1683	  rw [sectionCechProductEquiv_apply,
1684	      show ConcreteCategory.hom
1685	            (Pi.π (fun σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι => F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k)))) σ)
1686	            (ConcreteCategory.hom
1687	              (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q) t)
1688	          = ConcreteCategory.hom
1689	              (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q
1690	                ≫ Pi.π (fun σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι => F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k)))) σ) t
1691	          from rfl,
1692	      AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD, Preadditive.sum_comp, ab_hom_finsetSum_apply]
1693	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => ?_)
1694	  rw [Preadditive.zsmul_comp]
1695	  simp only [AddCommGrpCat.hom_zsmul, AddMonoidHom.smul_apply]
1696	  rw [sectionCechProductEquiv_apply]
1697	  congr 1
1698	  have hmap : (sectionCechCosimplicial U F).map (SimplexCategory.δ i) ≫ Pi.π _ σ
1699	      = Pi.π _ (σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom) ≫ sectionCechFaceRestr U F σ i :=
1700	    Pi.lift_π _ σ
1701	  rw [CosimplicialObject.δ, hmap]
1702	  rfl
1703	
1704	end SectionCechBridge

1850	/-- **Additive per-coface naturality** (accessor-1, the form the coface match consumes).
1851	The additive comparison `φ_σ` intertwines the accessor-1 {\v C}ech face restriction
1852	`sectionCechFaceRestr` with the away-localisation coface `dCoface`.  Obtained from the
1853	linear naturality `phiL_naturality` via the accessor bridge `restr_bridge`. -/
1854	private lemma phi_naturality {q : ℕ} (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) (i : Fin (q + 2))
1855	    (x : ToType ((tP M).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op
1856	        (⨅ l, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s ((σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom) l)))))) :
1857	    phi M s σ (ConcreteCategory.hom (sectionCechFaceRestr (tU s) (tP M) σ i) x)
1858	      = dCoface s M (q + 1) σ i (phi M s (σ ∘ i.succAbove) x) := by
1859	  have hb := restr_bridge M
1860	    (⨅ k, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s (σ k)))
1861	    (⨅ l, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s ((σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom) l)))
1862	    (homOfLE (le_iInf (fun l => iInf_le _ ((SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom l)))) x
1863	  simp only [sectionCechFaceRestr, tU]
1864	  refine Eq.trans (congrArg (phi M s σ) hb) ?_
1865	  exact DFunLike.congr_fun (phiL_naturality M s σ i) x

1870	private noncomputable def sectionProdAddEquiv (p : ℕ) :
1871	    ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)).obj (SimplexCategory.mk p))
1872	      ≃+ (∀ σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι,
1873	            ToType ((tP M).presheaf.obj
1874	              (Opposite.op (⨅ k, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s (σ k)))))) where
1875	  toFun := sectionCechProductEquiv (tU s) (tP M) p
1876	  invFun := (sectionCechProductEquiv (tU s) (tP M) p).symm
1877	  left_inv := (sectionCechProductEquiv (tU s) (tP M) p).left_inv
1878	  right_inv := (sectionCechProductEquiv (tU s) (tP M) p).right_inv
1879	  map_add' x y := by
1880	    funext σ
1881	    simp only [sectionCechProductEquiv_apply, Pi.add_apply]
1882	    exact map_add _ x y

1888	    ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)).obj (SimplexCategory.mk p))

1894	    (y : ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)).obj (SimplexCategory.mk p)))
1895	    (σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι) :
1896	    sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s p y σ = phi M s σ (sectionCechProductEquiv (tU s) (tP M) p y σ) :=
1897	  rfl

1899	/-- Reading the inverse comparison coordinatewise: applying `sectionToModuleAddEquiv.symm`
1900	to a module tuple `z` and projecting recovers `φ_τ⁻¹ (z τ)`. -/
1901	private lemma sectionProdEquiv_symm_apply (q : ℕ) (z : ∀ σ : Fin (q + 1) → ι, dCoeff s M σ)
1902	    (τ : Fin (q + 1) → ι) :
1903	    sectionCechProductEquiv (tU s) (tP M) q ((sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s q).symm z) τ
1904	      = (phi M s τ).symm (z τ) := by
1905	  have h : sectionCechProductEquiv (tU s) (tP M) q ((sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s q).symm z)
1906	      = sectionProdAddEquiv M s q ((sectionProdAddEquiv M s q).symm
1907	          ((AddEquiv.piCongrRight (fun σ => phi M s σ)).symm z)) := rfl
1908	  rw [h, AddEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
1909	  rfl

1911	/-- **(c2 + tilde-bridge) Coface match** (`lem:section_cech_coface_match`): under the
1912	degreewise comparison `sectionToModuleAddEquiv`, the section {\v C}ech coface differential
1913	`objD` matches the away-localisation module differential `dDiff`.  Combines the abstract
1914	cosimplicial unfold `sectionCech_objD_apply` with the per-coface tilde-bridge

1917	    sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s (q + 1)
1918	        (ConcreteCategory.hom
1919	          (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)) q)
1920	          ((sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s q).symm z))
1921	      = dDiff s M (q + 1) z := by
1922	  funext σ
1923	  rw [sectionToModuleAddEquiv_apply, sectionCech_objD_apply, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
1924	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => ?_)
1925	  rw [map_zsmul, sectionProdEquiv_symm_apply, phi_naturality]
1926	  exact congrArg ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) • dCoface s M (q + 1) σ i ·)
1927	    (AddEquiv.apply_symm_apply (phi M s (σ ∘ i.succAbove)) (z (σ ∘ i.succAbove)))

1935	    Function.Exact
1936	      (ConcreteCategory.hom

1940	  have sq : ∀ r : ℕ,
1941	      (ConcreteCategory.hom
1942	            (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial (tU s) (tP M)) r)).comp
1943	          (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s r).symm.toAddMonoidHom
1944	        = (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s (r + 1)).symm.toAddMonoidHom.comp
1945	            (dDiff s M (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom := by
1946	    intro r

1954	    (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s q).symm (sectionToModuleAddEquiv M s (q + 1)).symm

2051	`lemma-cech-cohomology-quasi-coherent-trivial`).  Let `s : ι → R` be a finite family with
2052	`D(f) = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)` (so `{sᵢ}` covers the basic open `D(f)`, spanning only `√(f)`, NOT necessarily
2053	the unit ideal of `R`).  Then the section {\v C}ech complex of `~M` over `{D(sᵢ)}` has vanishing
2054	homology in all positive degrees.

2057	by change of base to `R_f = Localization.Away f` (where `{sᵢ/1}` does span the unit ideal),

2063	    {ι : Type u} [Finite ι] (s : ι → R) (f : R)
2064	    (hcov : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f : (Spec R).Opens)
2065	      = ⨆ i, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
2066	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
2067	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
2068	      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) := by
2069	  -- each `sᵢ` lies in `√(f)` since `D(sᵢ) ⊆ D(f)`.
2070	  have hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k := by
2071	    intro i
2072	    have hle : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i) : (Spec R).Opens) ≤ PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f := by
2073	      rw [hcov]; exact le_iSup (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i)) i
2074	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen_le_basicOpen_iff (s i) f).mp hle
2075	    exact ⟨k, Ideal.mem_span_singleton.mp hk⟩

2078	      (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤ := by
2079	    rw [← PrimeSpectrum.iSup_basicOpen_eq_top_iff]
2080	    simp only [← PrimeSpectrum.comap_basicOpen]
2081	    rw [← map_iSup, ← hcov, PrimeSpectrum.comap_basicOpen, eq_top_iff]
2082	    rintro q -
2083	    rw [PrimeSpectrum.mem_basicOpen]
2084	    exact fun hu => q.isPrime.ne_top
2085	      (Ideal.eq_top_of_isUnit_mem _ hu (IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit f))

2096	so that the `S`-localisation `(M⊗_R S)_{s̄_σ}` is an `R`-localisation of `M` at `powers (s_σ)`).

2098	This is the route-B1 analogue of `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway`: the `D(f)` case takes
2099	`S = Localization.Away f`, where `hspan` is `affine_cover_span_localizationAway` and `hloc` is automatic
2100	(`Localization.Away` of an `R`-element is already an `R`-localisation); the general affine `V` needs the
2101	genuine `S = Γ(V)` and the geometric `hloc`.  Both are discharged at the call site from `IsAffineOpen V`
2102	via `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen`. -/

2105	    (S : Type u) [CommRing S] [Algebra R S]
2106	    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R S (s i))) = ⊤)
2107	    (hloc : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
2108	      IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (CechLocalized.sprod s σ))
2109	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (CechLocalized.sprod s σ)))))
2110	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
2111	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
2112	      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) := by
2113	  obtain ⟨q, rfl⟩ : ∃ q, p = q + 1 := ⟨p - 1, by omega⟩

2119	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — general-affine-open seed (geometric assembly)
2120	
2121	The final geometric wrapper `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineOpen` discharges the change-of-base
2122	data `(S, hspan, hloc)` of `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineCover` from `IsAffineOpen V`, with
2123	`S := Γ(V, 𝒪)`.  The section-restriction algebra `Algebra Γ(V) Γ(D a)` is NOT a synthesizable instance
2124	(it depends on the inclusion `D a ⟶ V`); it is provided explicitly as the `.toAlgebra` of the
2125	restriction map — the same one `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen` constructs — and the
2126	scalar tower `R → Γ(V) → Γ(D a)` is `rfl`-definitional. -/
2127	
2128	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
2129	
2130	open AlgebraicTopology Scheme.Modules
2131	
2132	/-- **Basic open of a restricted global section** (geometric brick for the general-affine seed).  For
2133	the affine scheme `Spec R`, an open `V`, and `a : R`, the basic open of the restriction
2134	`algebraMap R Γ(V) a` of the global section `a` to `V` is `V ⊓ D(a)`.  The restriction factors through
2135	`Γ(⊤)` *definitionally* (`algebraMap R Γ(V) a = (Spec R).presheaf.map _ (algebraMap R Γ(⊤) a)`, `rfl`),
2136	so `Scheme.basicOpen_res` gives `V ⊓ (Spec R).basicOpen (a : Γ(⊤))` and `basicOpen_eq_of_affine`
2137	identifies `(Spec R).basicOpen (a : Γ(⊤)) = D(a)`.  (Avoids the `Algebra Γ(⊤) Γ(V)` scoped instance,
2138	which is shadowed in this file's open-context.)  Project-local: supplies both the spanning datum
2139	`hspan` and the per-`σ` localisation datum `hloc` of the change-of-base seed. -/
2140	private lemma basicOpen_algMap_section {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (V : (Spec R).Opens) (a : ↥R) :
2141	    (Spec R).basicOpen (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a)
2142	    = V ⊓ PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a := by
2143	  have key : (Spec R).basicOpen (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op ⊤)) a)
2144	      = PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a := basicOpen_eq_of_affine a
2145	  rw [show algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a
2146	        = ConcreteCategory.hom ((Spec R).presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_top : V ≤ ⊤)).op)
2147	            (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op ⊤)) a) from rfl,
2148	      (Spec R).basicOpen_res, key]

2150	/-- **Cover of a general affine open: {\v C}ech vanishing for the tilde sheaf** (Stacks 02KG,
